Package org.springframework.data.redis.listener.support

@NullMarked package org.springframework.data.redis.listener.support
Implementation classes for Spring Messaging integration.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.data.redis.listener
    Base package for Redis message listener / pubsub container facility
    org.springframework.data.redis.listener.adapter
    Message listener adapter package.
  • Class
    Description
    CachingTopicResolver<T extends Topic>
    Caching TopicResolver variant using a TopicResolver for the actual resolution.
    PubSubHeaders
    Pre-defined names and prefixes to be used for setting and/or retrieving Redis Pub/sub attributes from/to generic message headers.
    SimpleTopicResolver
    A simple TopicResolver implementation for channel and pattern resolution.
    TopicResolver<T extends Topic>
    Strategy for resolving a String destination name to an actual Redis topic.
